name: @data-pulse-2/worker
description: NestJS standalone + BullMQ workers (email, audit-fanout, session-revoke). Email processor + provider-agnostic adapter; bootstrap consumes the BullMQ 'email' queue. Retry/backoff/DLQ policy deferred (T092, T301); real provider deferred (PQ-1).

scripts.lint: echo "worker: lint runs at the repo root"
